persona: Sarah Chen, 34, first-time patient with mild anxiety
goal: Schedule a new patient appointment for ongoing knee pain

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh, sure, that's totally fine!

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Thanks for calling PivotPoint Orthopaedics. Part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Sarah?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Yes, hi, that's me! I'm calling to, um, schedule an appointment as a new patient.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Please provide your date of birth.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Sure, it's March 15th, 1990.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Thank you. Just to confirm, you'd like to schedule a new patient consultation. Correct?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Yes, exactly, that's right!

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Do you have a specific provider you'd like to see, or are you open to the first available?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: I'm open to whoever's available soonest, I don't really have a preference since I've never been here before.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: We have openings this week and early next week. Do you have a preferred day or time of day for your appointment?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Weekday mornings work great for me, or a Saturday if that's an option!

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Looks like you already have a new patient consultation appointment booked. If you'd like, I can help you reschedule or cancel that appointment. Or I can connect you to a team member for more help. What would you like to do?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh, I think there might be some confusion — I've never called here before, so I don't think I have an existing appointment. Are you sure that's for me?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: I understand the confusion. My system shows a new patient consultation already booked under your information. If you'd like, I can connect you to a team member to review this and make sure everything is correct. Would you like me to do that?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Yes, please, that would be great — I definitely want to make sure everything's sorted out!

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Connecting you to a representative. Please wait.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh okay, thank you, I'll hold!

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Hello. You've reached the Pretty Good AI test line. Goodbye.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh, um, wait — I didn't actually get to speak with anyone or book my appointment. Is there someone else I can talk to?
